languages.text: Gain THP equal to your current HP for 1 round. Upon losing them, gain {g|f:b626505e8c944ca3ab68e4008fedce89}Fatigued{/g} until the end of combat.

languages.text:
The user gains {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to their current {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
When the user loses those temporary wounds, they suffer +1 stack of fatigued until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
The user gains temporary wounds equal to their current wounds for 1 round.
When the user loses those temporal wounds, they suffer {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}broken ribs{/g}.

languages.text:
Обладатель аугмента получает на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временное здоровье{/g} в размере текущего значения {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g}.
Когда обладатель аугмента теряет это временное здоровье, он получает эффект {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}сломанные ребра{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
Обладатель аугмента получает на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временное здоровье{/g} в размере текущего значения {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g}.
Когда обладатель аугмента теряет это временное здоровье, он получает эффект {g|f:d51b30ccb3d447b28c77b7057a5ccfa0}сломанные ребра{/g}.

Обладатель аугмента получает на 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунд{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}временное здоровье{/g} в размере текущего значения {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}здоровья{/g}.

languages.text:
El usuario gana tantas {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}heridas temporales{/g} como sus {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}heridas{/g} actuales durante 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asalto{/g}.
Cuando el usuario pierde las heridas temporales, sufre 1 acumulación de fatigado hasta el final del combate.

traits.locale_text:

languages.text:
Der Nutzer erhält 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporäre Wunden{/g} in Höhe seiner aktuellen {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}.
Verliert der Nutzer temporäre Wunden, wird er bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit +1 Stapel "Erschöpft" belegt.

traits.locale_text:
Der Nutzer erhält 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runde{/g} lang {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporäre Wunden{/g} in Höhe seiner aktuellen {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}Wunden{/g}.
Verliert der Nutzer temporäre Wunden, wird er bis zum Ende des Kampfes mit +1 Stapel "Erschöpft" belegt.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, mevcut {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı kadar {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}geçici sağlık{/g} puanı kazanır. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.
Kullanıcı, bu geçici sağlık puanlarını kaybettiğinde +1 yorgunluk birikimine maruz kalır. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
languages.original_text:
The user gains {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to their current {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
When the user loses those temporary wounds, they suffer +1 stack of fatigued until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Kullanıcı, mevcut {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}sağlık{/g} puanı kadar {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}geçici sağlık{/g} puanı kazanır. Etkisi 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} sürer.
Kullanıcı, bu geçici sağlık puanlarını kaybettiğinde +1 yorgunluk birikimine maruz kalır. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.

languages.text:
L'utilisateur gagne un nombre de {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}blessures temporaires{/g} égal à ses {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} actuelles pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
Lorsqu'il perd ces blessures temporaires, il subit +1 cumul de Fatigue jusqu'à la fin du combat.
languages.original_text:
The user gains {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to their current {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
When the user loses those temporary wounds, they suffer +1 stack of fatigued until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
L'utilisateur gagne un nombre de {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}blessures temporaires{/g} égal à ses {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}blessures{/g} actuelles pendant 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.
Lorsqu'il perd ces blessures temporaires, il subit +1 cumul de Fatigue jusqu'à la fin du combat.

languages.text:
使用者获得等同于当前{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}临时生命值{/g}，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
失去这些临时生命值时，使用者受到1层疲劳效果，持续至战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
The user gains {g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}temporary wounds{/g} equal to their current {g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}wounds{/g} for 1 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}round{/g}.

traits.locale_text:
使用者获得等同于当前{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}生命值{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}临时生命值{/g}，持续1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。

languages.text:
使用者は1{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}の間、現在の{g|Encyclopedia:HitPoints}負傷{/g}に等しい{g|Encyclopedia:TemporaryWounds}一時負傷{/g}を得る。
その一時負傷を失ったとき、使用者は戦闘終了まで疲労を+1スタック受ける。
